channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 5.4%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: How Starmer can reassert his authority by sacking Wes Streeting
item.description: How Starmer can reassert his authority by sacking Wes Streeting

item.title: Independent UK Politics: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’s address amid Starmer leadership crisis
item.description: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’s address amid Starmer leadership crisis

item.title: FT UK Politics: Badenoch is underpriced to become prime minister
item.description: Badenoch is underpriced to become prime minister

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.
item.description: Assuming Streeting does resign and gets a contest I suspect his platform will be a lot more left-wing than many seem to realise. He knows who the electorate is.

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: And frankly the the total farce of locking labour into "no tax increases for working people" and all that bollocks was not created in the ungovernable electorate but in Westminister.
item.description: And frankly the the total farce of locking labour into "no tax increases for working people" and all that bollocks was not created in the ungovernable electorate but in Westminister.

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech - The Guardian

item.title: i Politics: Streeting allies 'begged' Starmer loyalist MPs not to back PM
item.description: Streeting allies 'begged' Starmer loyalist MPs not to back PM

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work
item.description: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work

item.title: FT UK Politics: Keir Starmer braced for leadership battle to begin on Thursday
item.description: Keir Starmer braced for leadership battle to begin on Thursday

item.title: BBC Politics: Wes Streeting: Ambitious minister at centre of leadership speculation
item.description: Wes Streeting: Ambitious minister at centre of leadership speculation
